description_long: This hotel features a Mediterranean-inspired design with two prominent cylindrical towers topped by blue domes, flanking a central rectangular building with arched windows and a terracotta roof. The main entrance is set back from a circular stone plaza with a flagpole, and the approach is lined with palm trees and a pool area. The hotel grounds include shaded outdoor seating areas, a pool with lounge chairs, and a small pavilion. The facade is painted in light, sandy tones with contrasting blue and green accents on the domes and roof. Large windows and arched doorways provide ample natural light and a welcoming appearance. The overall layout is open and inviting, with landscaped elements and a clear separation between the public plaza and private hotel spaces.
description: A Mediterranean-style hotel with blue-domed towers, arched windows, a central pool, palm trees, and a circular stone plaza at the entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, blue-domed towers, central pool, palm trees, and circular stone plaza with a flagpole.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical towers, rear pool area, and the arrangement of palm trees and outdoor seating.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the hotel, the blue domes, rooftop terrace, and the circular plaza in the distance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side of the towers, pool area, palm trees, and outdoor seating arrangements.
